title: ocotea heterochroma
intro: Ocotea heterochroma, also known as Sandalo de la selva, is a plant species native to the Amazon rainforest, belonging to the family Lauraceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ocotea heterochroma include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and providing relief from pain and inflammation. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including essential oils, capsules, and teas, which are used for aromatherapy, dietary supplements, and traditional medicine.
